incentive.statement: A choice between one result and a full result paradigm belongs to the Result surface while typed application state remains the sole generation authority.

coordinator.responsibility: Coordinate shell ownership, canonical state continuity, focused proof, and alignment.

outcome: Both NNC and VNC output-scope controls are presented in #3 Result and are absent from #2 Authority; the route is compact and source-faithful, rendering only Canvas witnesses and Andrews structure while keeping non-source engine proof internal and visually linking Andrews participant carriers.

responsibilities.statement: Relocate the existing canonical controls into the Result panel and style their result-owned presentation, including a compact default-collapsed Built from receipt.

actors.contribution: Move presentation ownership without duplicating control IDs or state, and collapse provenance visually without deleting it.

responsibilities.statement: Keep the relocated NNC control in the existing availability synchronization, preserve both typed output-scope consumers, and project a compact Canvas/Andrews-only derivation view with application-owned participant-to-formula display segments, including the discontinuous subject pers1-pers2 and num1-num2 dyads plus every typed mainline and shuntline object carrier, while leaving non-source proof internal.

actors.contribution: Retain canonical selection and visibility behavior after DOM relocation; remove non-Canvas/Andrews metadata only from the visible derivation projection; project typed participant carrier spans so the renderer does not infer participant grammar.

responsibilities.statement: Prove Result ownership, Authority absence, both clause-kind options, compact derivation and Built from disclosures, and focused runtime behavior.

actors.contribution: Add hostile shell-ownership assertions and run focused checks.

responsibilities.statement: Record the bounded target and closure evidence.

actors.contribution: Keep UI ownership separate from grammar authorization.

retirements.removalEvidence: Focused shell assertions and fresh browser proof show the VNC scope control in #3 Result and absent from #2 Authority; the same shell contract covers NNC.

evidence.detail: Filtered module runs passed classical_vnc_application.test.js 25/25 with explicit discontinuous subject-dyad and exhaustive mainline/shuntline object-link assertions, classical_causative_relation_ui.test.js 6/6, and ui.test.js 392/392; syntax checks and git diff --check passed.

Fresh localhost delivery loaded the Canvas/Andrews-only cache key and participant-link stylesheet, exposed six participant-link rules, preserved Result-owned output scope, and reported zero warning/error logs.
Architecture metrics stayed at baseline, but unrelated dirty board, source-picker/runtime, shared-action, and PDF audit paths are outside this assignment's actor coverage.
